distance_km.note: Search results confirm 42 km as the main race distance in classic technique

elevation_m.note: Search results state '1,077 meters of elevation' which matches the claimed 1077m within tolerance

country.note: Multiple sources confirm the race takes place in Germany, specifically in Bodenmais

region_state_province.note: Search results explicitly state 'Bodenmais in the Bavarian Forest' and 'Bavarian Forest'

discipline.note: Search results confirm both classic and freestyle (free technique) races are offered: '42 km and 22 km, both in free technique on Saturday and in classic technique on Sunday'

typical_participants.note: Search results state 'Starting places are limited to 550 per race day' for 2026, not ~1,100 total starters

year_founded.note: Search results describe it as 'organized for decades' and 'legendary' but do not specify the founding year of 2000

official_website.note: Search results confirm the official website is https://www.skadi-loppet.de/en

typical_race_date.note: Search results indicate the 2025 and 2026 races take place in late January (January 25-26), not just 'Late January' as a general month. The 2025 edition specifically notes it was 'earlier than usual' and moved to January from its traditional timing
